final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic still, concept art
Primary request: post-apocalyptic wasteland scene with a modified armored vehicle in a desolate desert
Scene/backdrop: collapsed city ruins in the distance, barren desert landscape, dust and sand swirling in the air
Subject: heavily modified armored vehicle with rusted metal plating, makeshift weapons, and survival gear
Style/medium: cinematic concept art, photorealistic digital painting
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, low horizon line emphasizing the vast wasteland
Lighting/mood: hazy yellow-orange sky, diffused light through dust clouds, tense and oppressive atmosphere
Color palette: muted ochre yellow + dusty brown + rust orange + pale sickly sky tones
Materials/textures: corroded metal, cracked concrete ruins, fine sand particles in air, weathered vehicle surfaces
Constraints: maintain the sense of scale between vehicle and distant ruins, keep dust atmosphere prominent
Avoid: clean surfaces, bright saturated colors, modern intact buildings, cheerful mood
